diagrams.title: Demand Wave Pattern
diagrams.description: A graph showing demand fluctuating over time with clear peaks and troughs, illustrating the wave concept
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the cyclic nature of IT demand and understand peak/trough periods

diagrams.title: Capacity vs Demand Over Time
diagrams.description: Overlay of fixed capacity line against fluctuating demand waves showing over-provisioning and under-utilization periods
diagrams.purpose: Understand problems with fixed capacity and benefits of wave-riding approach

diagrams.title: Elastic Capacity Model
diagrams.description: Diagram showing capacity automatically scaling up and down in response to demand waves
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how elastic capacity aligns with demand patterns for cost optimization
